comment: Simulated robots.txt fetch returning HTTP 403. Body is a typical WAF block page, not robots syntax. The parser must not crash and should report 'robots_reachable' as FAIL with evidence 'HTTP 403'.
body:
Access Denied

Your request has been blocked by our firewall.

target_path_not_disallowed.note: Cannot evaluate — robots.txt inaccessible, permissive default applied
